prompt:
Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: self-initiated studio project key art for website portfolio and Instagram
Primary request: Signal Atlas, a premium visual identity for an explainable AI intelligence platform; create an abstract neural cartography system made from luminous orbital paths, data nodes and one precise black core
Scene/backdrop: deep near-black infinite space with a subtle technical grid and controlled violet atmospheric glow
Style/medium: museum-grade contemporary 3D campaign art, Swiss editorial precision, tactile glass and anodized metal, highly polished creative studio output
Composition/framing: vertical 4:5 poster, monumental central object, generous edge space, visually strong crop at both square and portrait ratios
Lighting/mood: sharp rim light, deep shadows, intelligent and enigmatic
Color palette: near-black, electric violet, pale lavender, tiny coral-red signal points
Materials/textures: smoked glass, brushed black metal, translucent light trails, fine film grain
Constraints: original design, no existing brands, no logos, no readable text, no watermark, no UI screenshot, no generic stock imagery

Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: self-initiated studio project key art for website portfolio and Instagram
Primary request: Tidal Commons, a climate-data platform translating coastal risk into shared public scenarios; create a sculptural topographic coastline folding upward like layered paper while luminous data contours travel across it
Scene/backdrop: clean cobalt-blue field fading into a dark blue horizon
Style/medium: editorial 3D data sculpture, bold European design-studio campaign, minimal and conceptually intelligent
Composition/framing: vertical 4:5 poster, coastline sculpture crossing diagonally, strong negative space, useful square crop
Lighting/mood: cool directional studio light, calm but urgent
Color palette: cobalt blue, cyan, acid green contour lines, off-white land layers
Materials/textures: layered recycled paper, matte ceramic, delicate luminous filaments, subtle grain
Constraints: original design, no logos, no readable text, no watermark, no photoreal disaster imagery, no maps of a specific real place

Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: self-initiated studio project key art for website portfolio and Instagram
Primary request: Relay Field, an offline-first logistics application; create a kinetic chain of rugged signal modules moving through a black landscape, with one fluorescent route threading continuously through every module
Scene/backdrop: matte black architectural space with a low horizon and precise vanishing grid
Style/medium: futuristic industrial product campaign, refined 3D motion-design still, brutalist composition
Composition/framing: vertical 4:5 poster, modules recede upward in perspective, route creates a powerful S curve, crop-safe center
Lighting/mood: dramatic orange side light and controlled reflections, dependable rather than sci-fi fantasy
Color palette: black, safety orange, acid green route, small off-white interface lights
Materials/textures: rubberized hardware, powder-coated metal, emissive cable, light dust and grain
Constraints: original design, no vehicles, no existing device brands, no logos, no readable text, no watermark, no generic delivery imagery

Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: self-initiated design-object brand campaign for website portfolio and Instagram
Primary request: Morrow Objects, a circular homeware label; create three impossible but manufacturable-looking modular vessels balancing into one sculptural family
Scene/backdrop: saturated coral-red seamless studio with a dark burgundy floor transition
Style/medium: premium art-direction product photograph blended with precise 3D rendering, playful contemporary design magazine
Composition/framing: vertical 4:5 poster, asymmetrical stacked still life, bold silhouette, ample clean space, square-crop friendly
Lighting/mood: hard gallery spotlight with graphic shadows, warm and optimistic
Color palette: coral red, butter yellow, pale blush, one near-black accent
Materials/textures: matte ceramic, recycled translucent resin, soft speckled composite
Constraints: original product forms, no logos, no readable text, no watermark, no people, no common household-brand resemblance

Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: self-initiated cultural archive identity key art for website portfolio and Instagram
Primary request: After Hours Archive, a digital home for independent performance and sound; create a dense moving constellation of translucent event fragments orbiting a bright orange acoustic core
Scene/backdrop: black void with a faint circular stage floor and subtle haze
Style/medium: experimental cultural poster rendered as high-end 3D motion still, kinetic typography energy without actual text, art-school rigor
Composition/framing: vertical 4:5 poster, explosive central orbit with fragments frozen mid-motion, strong central crop
Lighting/mood: nocturnal, electric, celebratory, sharp flash mixed with ambient glow
Color palette: orange, vermilion, black, flashes of cobalt and pale cream
Materials/textures: translucent acetate, folded paper, chrome, light streaks, analog film grain
Constraints: no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no identifiable performers, no copyrighted album art

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: self-initiated material-technology campaign key art for website portfolio and Instagram
Primary request: Form Zero, an interactive story about adaptive materials; create one continuous soft metallic sheet transforming through compression, liquid flow and an architectural fold in a single impossible sculpture
Scene/backdrop: split monochrome studio, warm off-white on one side and deep charcoal on the other
Style/medium: avant-garde material study, extremely refined CGI, minimal fashion-campaign art direction
Composition/framing: vertical 4:5 poster, sculpture fills most of frame with elegant negative space, strong diagonal motion, square-crop safe
Lighting/mood: crisp softbox reflections, quiet and uncanny
Color palette: silver, charcoal, off-white, one thin vermilion edge glow
Materials/textures: liquid chrome, soft brushed aluminum, satin membrane, subtle grain
Constraints: original abstract sculpture, no logos, no readable text, no watermark, no humanoid form, no product branding

Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: self-initiated civic service platform identity key art for website portfolio and Instagram
Primary request: Civic Pulse, a public-service issue reporting platform; create a modular city block viewed from above where a single acid-green pulse propagates through streets, buildings and service nodes
Scene/backdrop: near-black technical model table fading into darkness
Style/medium: architectural model meets data visualization, bold editorial 3D campaign, precise and humane
Composition/framing: vertical 4:5 poster, isometric city occupies lower two thirds, pulse expands toward viewer, generous top space, square crop works
Lighting/mood: controlled night-time studio lighting, constructive and optimistic
Color palette: graphite black, warm gray, acid green pulse, coral markers
Materials/textures: dark paper architecture, frosted acrylic streets, emissive resin nodes, fine grain
Constraints: fictional city, original design, no logos, no readable text, no watermark, no surveillance aesthetic, no real civic seals

Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: self-initiated fintech operations platform identity key art for website portfolio and Instagram
Primary request: Kinetic Ledger, a financial operations system that makes money movement legible; create interlocking transparent accounting planes with colored tokens moving through precise cut channels, like a physical balance sheet in motion
Scene/backdrop: luminous pale-gray studio with a cobalt shadow plane
Style/medium: sophisticated editorial 3D infographic without labels, premium technology brand campaign, geometric and tactile
Composition/framing: vertical 4:5 poster, layered mechanism seen from elevated three-quarter angle, strong foreground-to-background rhythm, square-crop safe
Lighting/mood: bright analytical daylight, exact but approachable
Color palette: pale gray, cobalt blue, electric violet, coral-red and acid-green tokens
Materials/textures: frosted glass, milled aluminum, translucent acrylic, soft shadow grain
Constraints: abstract financial concept only, no currency symbols, no logos, no readable text, no watermark, no cryptocurrency clichés, no charts
